pkgmetadata.longdescription: Google APIs common protos[[pypi](httpsimg.shields.iopypivgoogle-cloud-audit-log.svg)](httpspypi.orgprojectgoogle-cloud-audit-log)The python classes generated from the googlecloudauditprotos in the [googleapisgoogleapis](httpsgithub.comgoogleapisgoogleapistreemastergooglecloudaudit) repository.
